1.content:
# 🤖 AI Chatbot - Observability
Comprehensive monitoring across **AI/LLM performance**, **backend API health**, and **frontend experience** (React + Flutter).

2.title: Total Chat Requests
2.query: fetch spans | filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot" | filter span.name == "ChatNVIDIA.chat" | summarize total_requests = count()

3.title: Avg LLM Response Time
3.query: fetch spans | filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot" | filter span.name == "ChatNVIDIA.chat" | summarize avg_duration_ms = avg(duration) / 1000000

4.title: Total Tokens Used
4.query: fetch spans | filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot" | filter span.name == "ChatNVIDIA.chat" | summarize total_tokens = sum(llm.usage.total_tokens)

5.title: Frontend Sessions
5.query: fetch user.sessions | filter in(frontend.name, {"AI_Chatbot", "AI_Chatbot_Flutter"}) | summarize sessions = count()

6.content:
## AI / LLM Performance

#### ⚠️ NIM API Rate Limit: 40rpm ⚠️

7.title: LLM Response Time Over Time
7.query: fetch spans | filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot" | filter span.name == "ChatNVIDIA.chat" | makeTimeseries { p50 = percentile(duration, 50), p95 = percentile(duration, 95), p99 = percentile(duration, 99) }

8.title: Token Usage Over Time
8.query: fetch spans | filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot" | filter span.name == "ChatNVIDIA.chat" | makeTimeseries { input_tokens = avg(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens), output_tokens = avg(gen_ai.usage.output_tokens) }

9.title: Avg Tokens per Request by Model
9.query: fetch spans | filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot" | filter span.name == "ChatNVIDIA.chat" | filter gen_ai.request.model != "unknown" | summarize avg_input_tokens = avg(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens), avg_output_tokens = avg(gen_ai.usage.output_tokens), by: {gen_ai.request.model}

10.title: LLM Request Volume Over Time
10.query: fetch spans | filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot" | filter span.name == "ChatNVIDIA.chat" | makeTimeseries requests = count()

12.title: Request Rate & Error Rate
12.query: timeseries { requests = sum(dt.service.request.count), failures = sum(dt.service.request.failure_count) }, filter: {dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"}

14.title: Slowest Endpoints (by p95)
14.description:
**Description:**  
This table displays the top 10 endpoints of the "nvidia-chatbot" service, ranked by their 95th percentile response time (p95). It includes metrics such as request count, average duration, and p95 duration.  

**Purpose:**  
This visualization helps identify performance bottlenecks and high-latency endpoints, enabling targeted optimization efforts for critical chatbot interactions.
14.query: fetch spans | filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot" | filter request.is_root_span == true | summarize requests = count(), avg_duration = avg(duration), p95 = percentile(duration, 95), by: {endpoint.name} | sort p95 desc | limit 10

15.title: Requests by Endpoint
15.query:
fetch spans 
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot" 
| filter request.is_root_span == true 
| summarize requests = count(), by: {endpoint.name} 
| sort requests desc 
| limit 10

101.title: Total Sessions
101.query: fetch user.sessions | filter in(frontend.name, {"AI_Chatbot", "AI_Chatbot_Flutter"}) | summarize total_sessions = count()

102.title: Page Views
102.query: fetch user.events | filter in(frontend.name, {"AI_Chatbot", "AI_Chatbot_Flutter"}) | filter characteristics.has_page_summary == true OR characteristics.has_view_summary == true | summarize total_page_views = count()

103.title: Avg Session Duration
103.query: fetch user.sessions | filter in(frontend.name, {"AI_Chatbot", "AI_Chatbot_Flutter"}) | summarize avg_duration_sec = avg(duration) / 1000000000

104.title: User Interactions
104.query: fetch user.events | filter in(frontend.name, {"AI_Chatbot", "AI_Chatbot_Flutter"}) | filter characteristics.has_user_interaction == true | summarize total_interactions = count()

105.title: Bounce Rate
105.query: fetch user.sessions | filter in(frontend.name, {"AI_Chatbot", "AI_Chatbot_Flutter"}) | summarize bounced_sessions = countIf(bounce == true), total_sessions = count() | fieldsAdd bounce_rate_pct = (bounced_sessions / total_sessions) * 100

106.title: Mobile Traffic
106.query: fetch user.events | filter in(frontend.name, {"AI_Chatbot", "AI_Chatbot_Flutter"}) | filter characteristics.has_page_summary == true OR characteristics.has_view_summary == true | summarize mobile = countIf(device.type == "mobile"), total = count() | fieldsAdd mobile_pct = (toDouble(mobile) / toDouble(total)) * 100.0

107.title: Frontend Errors
107.query: fetch user.events | filter in(frontend.name, {"AI_Chatbot", "AI_Chatbot_Flutter"}) | filter characteristics.has_error == true | summarize error_count = count()

109.title: Sessions Over Time
109.query: fetch user.sessions | filter in(frontend.name, {"AI_Chatbot", "AI_Chatbot_Flutter"}) | makeTimeseries sessions = count(), by: {frontend.name}

110.title: User Interactions Over Time
110.query: fetch user.events | filter in(frontend.name, {"AI_Chatbot", "AI_Chatbot_Flutter"}) | filter characteristics.has_user_interaction == true | makeTimeseries interactions = count(), by: {frontend.name}

111.title: Top Pages & Views
111.query: fetch user.events | filter in(frontend.name, {"AI_Chatbot", "AI_Chatbot_Flutter"}) | filter characteristics.has_page_summary == true OR characteristics.has_view_summary == true | summarize page_views = count(), by: {frontend.name, view.name} | sort page_views desc | limit 10

112.title: Session Duration Distribution (seconds)
112.query: fetch user.sessions | filter in(frontend.name, {"AI_Chatbot", "AI_Chatbot_Flutter"}) | fieldsAdd duration_sec = duration / 1000000000 | summarize p50_duration = percentile(duration_sec, 50), p75_duration = percentile(duration_sec, 75), p90_duration = percentile(duration_sec, 90), p95_duration = percentile(duration_sec, 95), avg_duration = avg(duration_sec), by: {frontend.name} | sort avg_duration desc

115.title: Frontend Request Volume
115.query: fetch user.events | filter in(frontend.name, {"AI_Chatbot", "AI_Chatbot_Flutter"}) | filter characteristics.has_request == true | makeTimeseries requests = count(), by: {frontend.name}

116.title: Frontend Errors Over Time
116.query: fetch user.events | filter in(frontend.name, {"AI_Chatbot", "AI_Chatbot_Flutter"}) | filter characteristics.has_error == true | makeTimeseries errors = count(), by: {frontend.name}

117.title: Top Errors
117.query: fetch user.events | filter in(frontend.name, {"AI_Chatbot", "AI_Chatbot_Flutter"}) | filter characteristics.has_error == true | summarize error_count = count(), by: {frontend.name, error.name, error.type} | sort error_count desc | limit 15

119.title: Device Type Distribution
119.query: fetch user.events | filter in(frontend.name, {"AI_Chatbot", "AI_Chatbot_Flutter"}) | filter characteristics.has_page_summary == true OR characteristics.has_view_summary == true | summarize views = count(), by: {device.type} | sort views desc

120.title: Browser Distribution
120.query: fetch user.events | filter in(frontend.name, {"AI_Chatbot", "AI_Chatbot_Flutter"}) | filter characteristics.has_page_summary == true OR characteristics.has_view_summary == true | summarize views = count(), by: {browser.name} | sort views desc

121.title: Operating System Distribution
121.query: fetch user.events | filter in(frontend.name, {"AI_Chatbot", "AI_Chatbot_Flutter"}) | filter characteristics.has_page_summary == true OR characteristics.has_view_summary == true | summarize views = count(), by: {os.name} | sort views desc

122.title: Device by Frontend
122.query: fetch user.events | filter in(frontend.name, {"AI_Chatbot", "AI_Chatbot_Flutter"}) | filter characteristics.has_page_summary == true OR characteristics.has_view_summary == true | summarize views = count(), by: {frontend.name, device.type} | sort views desc | filterOut isNull(device.type)

123.title: Device Usage Trends
123.query: fetch user.events | filter in(frontend.name, {"AI_Chatbot", "AI_Chatbot_Flutter"}) | filter characteristics.has_page_summary == true OR characteristics.has_view_summary == true | makeTimeseries views = count(), by: {device.type}

125.title: Event Timeline
125.query:
fetch events, from:now()-7d
| filter dt.entity.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter isNotNull(chaos.preset) 
| fields timestamp, chaos.preset
| makeTimeseries healthy = countIf(chaos.preset == "healthy"), unhealthy = countIf(chaos.preset != "healthy")

126.title: Event Timeline
126.query:
fetch events, from:now()-7d
| filter dt.entity.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter isNotNull(chaos.preset) 
| fields timestamp, chaos.preset
| sort timestamp desc
//| makeTimeseries healthy = countIf(chaos.preset == "healthy"), unhealthy = countIf(chaos.preset != "healthy")

annotations.input:
fetch events, from:now()-7d
| filter dt.entity.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter isNotNull(chaos.preset)
| filter chaos.state == "active"
| parse event.name, "'Chaos Engineering: ' LD:preset"
annotations.name: Chaos Engineering Enabled

annotations.input:
fetch events, from:now()-7d
| filter dt.entity.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter isNotNull(chaos.preset)
| filter chaos.state == "inactive"
| parse event.name, "'Chaos Engineering: ' LD:preset"
annotations.name: Chaos Engineering Disabled
